compiled_state.title: create-dso-app.sh: uv, ast-grep, semgrep not installed -> prerequisites missing for full plugin functionality
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
create-dso-app.sh does not install uv, ast-grep (sg), or semgrep, all of which are prerequisites for full dso plugin functionality. uv is required by the nava-platform tool. ast-grep (sg) and semgrep are used by the test quality gate and structural code search features.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: create-dso-app.sh installs uv (e.g., via curl installer or brew), ast-grep (via brew or cargo), and semgrep (via pip/uv) as part of its dependency setup, or provides explicit installation instructions for each.
- **Observed**: create-dso-app.sh does not install or check for uv, ast-grep, or semgrep.

## Affected Component
plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh — dependency installation

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC) — single file missing dep checks for uv, ast-grep, semgrep. Same fix pattern × 3.
